hero.heading: The Art of Freshness 2
hero.subheading: Authentic Japanese flavors delivered with modern elegance. Experience the best sushi in town.

menu.title: Salmon Nigiri
menu.description: Two pieces of fresh Atlantic salmon over perfectly seasoned vinegar rice.

menu.title: Spicy Tuna Roll
menu.description: Fresh tuna mixed with spicy mayo, cucumber, and sesame seeds.

menu.title: Dragon Roll
menu.description: Eel and cucumber inside, topped with avocado, tobiko and eel sauce.

menu.title: California Roll
menu.description: Crab meat imitation, avocado, and cucumber. A classic favorite.

menu.title: Sashimi Deluxe
menu.description: Chef's choice of 12 pieces of assorted fresh raw fish (no rice).

menu.title: Shrimp Tempura
menu.description: Crispy deep-fried shrimp served with savory dipping sauce.

menu.title: Rainbow Roll
menu.description: California roll topped with assorted sashimi slices and avocado.

menu.title: Miso Soup
menu.description: Traditional soybean paste soup with tofu, seaweed, and scallions.

menu.title: Matcha Mochi
menu.description: Sweet rice cake filled with green tea ice cream. Perfect dessert.

testimonials.name: Sarah Jenkins
testimonials.quote: The Dragon Roll was absolutely stunning. Best sushi place in the city by far! The atmosphere is so relaxing.

testimonials.name: Michael Ross
testimonials.quote: Fresh ingredients and fast service. The sashimi melt in your mouth. Highly recommend booking a table on weekends!

testimonials.name: Emily Dao
testimonials.quote: I love the clean design of the place and the food matches the vibe. The Matcha Mochi is a must-try dessert.

contact.intro: We are located in the heart of the downtown district. Come visit us for lunch or dinner.
